## Problem

Describe the problem or limitation.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or change you want.

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternatives you thought about.

## Scope

- Bot logic
- Web dashboard
- Admin panel
- Deploy / ops
- Documentation

## Additional Context

Add examples, references, or screenshots if useful.
